name: Cruces Total Golf
address: 170 W Picacho Ave, Las Cruces, NM 88005
about: Cruces Total Golf is an indoor golf facility featuring state-of-the-art simulators where golfers can play on world-renowned courses year-round. Located at 170 W. Picacho Ave in Las Cruces, NM, the venue offers a premier destination for golf enthusiasts of all skill levels to hone their game regardless of weather conditions. The facility provides simulated golf experiences, professional instruction, club fittings, and leagues, with a recently opened bar on-site to enhance the social experience.
why_golfers_like_it: Year-round access to world-renowned golf courses through state-of-the-art simulators
Professional instruction available for all skill levels, including PGA-certified coaches
Variety of membership tiers and flexible booking options to suit different needs
Active leagues and tournaments for competitive play and social engagement

food_and_drink.notes: Full liquor license and bar now open

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you'll need to bring your own clubs unless you prefer to rent theirs for $35 per hour.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: The venue has a snack bar available and a full liquor license and bar now open. Outside food and drink policies aren't specified.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify the time required to play 18 holes, but bay rentals are available for $35 per hour or $90 for 3 hours.

faq.question: Is Cruces Total Golf kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Absolutely! Cruces Total Golf is family-friendly and suitable for golfers of all ages, with activities and programs for both adults and kids.
